stemHtml: A pilot has planned a VFR trip by day but, due to weather delays, must now undertake the same flight at night, with clear weather. Which of the following threats pose the greatest risk to their flight?

options.a: Tall masts and other obstacles with red lights are difficult to see.
options.b: Difficulty recognising the aerodrome from its beacon.
options.c: Difficulty recognising populated areas, including well lit ones.
options.d: Inability to recognise fixes planned for navigating during the day.
